name: Polygala
summary: It is best framed as a traditional nootropic-style root with limited modern clinical depth.
description: It is best framed as a traditional nootropic-style root with limited modern clinical depth.
safetyNotes: CNS-active potential; avoid stacking with sedatives, alcohol, sleep aids, antidepressants, or other psychoactive supplements without clinician review. Avoid pregnancy/breastfeeding use unless supervised.
interactions: Potential additive sedation or cognitive-drug interactions

sources.title: Polygala tenuifolia willd. Extract alleviates LPS-induced acute lung injury in rats via TLR4/NF-κB pathway and NLRP3 inflammasome suppression
A review on the phytopharmacological studies of the genus Polygala

dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Processed root decoction/extract and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Processed root decoction/extract and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
